mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders( user_id, store_id, payment_method, total_price, requests ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{storeId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{totalPrice}, #{requests} )
mapper.select: SELECT order_id AS orderId, user_id AS userId, store_id AS storeId, payment_method AS paymentMethod, total_price AS totalPrice, requests AS requests, created_data AS createdData FROM orders ORDER BY order_id ASC

SELECT order_id AS orderId, user_id AS userId, store_id AS storeId, payment_method AS paymentMethod, total_price AS totalPrice, requests AS requests, created_data AS createdData FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
